mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `bank`.`task`( user_id, ticket_number, task_type, task_detail_type, assigned_level, expected_waiting_time, status, member_id, ranking, created_at, updated_at,is_ai) VALUES ( #{task.userId}, #{task.ticketNumber}, #{task.taskType}, #{task.taskDetailType}, #{task.assignedLevel}, #{task.expectedWaitingTime}, #{task.status}, #{task.memberId}, #{task.ranking}, IFNULL(#{task.createdAt}, NOW()), IFNULL(#{task.updatedAt}, NOW()), #{task.isAi} )
mapper.update: UPDATE `bank`.`task` SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND (#{status} != 'IN_PROGRESS' OR status = 'WAITING')
mapper.select: SELECT ticket_number FROM `bank`.`task` WHERE ticket_number LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%') AND DATE(created_at) = CURDATE() ORDER BY ticket_number DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `bank`.`task` WHERE task_type = #{taskType} AND status = 'WAITING'

SELECT m.id FROM `bank`.`member` m LEFT JOIN ( SELECT member_id, SUM(CASE task_type WHEN '빠른 업무' THEN 5 WHEN '상담 업무' THEN 10 WHEN '기업 • 특수' THEN 25 ELSE 5 END) AS total_wait_min FROM `bank`.`task` WHERE status = 'WAITING' GROUP BY member_id ) w ON m.id = w.member_id WHERE m.level >= #{minLevel} AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY COALESCE(w.total_wait_min, 0) ASC, m.level ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE task_type WHEN '빠른 업무' THEN 5 WHEN '상담 업무' THEN 10 WHEN '기업 • 특수' THEN 25 ELSE 5 END), 0) FROM `bank`.`task` WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND status = 'WAITING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `bank`.`task` WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND status = 'WAITING'

SELECT `t1`.`task_id` AS `taskId`, `t1`.`user_id` AS `userId`, `t1`.`ticket_number` AS `ticketNumber`, `t1`.`task_type` AS `taskType`, `t1`.`task_detail_type` AS `taskDetailType`, `t1`.`assigned_level` AS `assignedLevel`, `t1`.`expected_waiting_time` AS `expectedWaitingTime`, `t1`.`status` AS `status`, `t1`.`member_id` AS `memberId`, `t1`.`ranking` AS `ranking`, `t1`.`created_at` AS `createdAt`, `t1`.`updated_at` AS `updatedAt`, `t2`.`name` AS `name`, `t2`.`level` AS `level` FROM `bank`.`task` AS `t1` LEFT JOIN `bank`.`member` AS `t2` ON `t1`.`member_id` = `t2`.`id` WHERE `t1`.`user_id` = #{userId} ORDER BY `createdAt` DESC

SELECT `t1`.`task_id` AS `taskId`, `t1`.`user_id` AS `userId`, `t1`.`ticket_number` AS `ticketNumber`, `t1`.`task_type` AS `taskType`, `t1`.`task_detail_type` AS `taskDetailType`, `t1`.`assigned_level` AS `assignedLevel`, `t1`.`expected_waiting_time` AS `expectedWaitingTime`, `t1`.`status` AS `status`, `t1`.`member_id` AS `memberId`, `t1`.`ranking` AS `ranking`, `t1`.`created_at` AS `createdAt`, `t1`.`updated_at` AS `updatedAt`, `t2`.`name` AS `name`, `t2`.`level` AS `level` FROM `bank`.`task` AS `t1` LEFT JOIN `bank`.`member` AS `t2` ON `t1`.`member_id` = `t2`.`id` WHERE `t1`.`user_id` = #{userId} ORDER BY `createdAt` DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT IFNULL(AVG(expected_waiting_time), 0) FROM `bank`.`task` WHERE status = 'WAITING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `bank`.`member` WHERE status = 1
SELECT task_type AS taskType, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM bank.task WHERE status = 'WAITING' GROUP BY task_type

SELECT `t1`.`task_id` AS `taskId`, `t1`.`user_id` AS `userId`, `t1`.`ticket_number` AS `ticketNumber`, `t1`.`task_type` AS `taskType`, `t1`.`task_detail_type` AS `taskDetailType`, `t1`.`assigned_level` AS `assignedLevel`, `t1`.`expected_waiting_time` AS `expectedWaitingTime`, `t1`.`status` AS `status`, `t1`.`member_id` AS `memberId`, `t1`.`ranking` AS `ranking`, `t1`.`created_at` AS `createdAt`, `t1`.`updated_at` AS `updatedAt`, `t2`.`name` AS `name`, `t2`.`level` AS `level`, `t3`.`name` AS `userName`, `t3`.`grade` AS `grade`, `t3`.`gender` AS `gender`, `t3`.`age` AS `age`, `t1`.`is_ai` AS `isAi` FROM `bank`.`task` AS `t1` LEFT JOIN `bank`.`member` AS `t2` ON `t1`.`member_id` = `t2`.`id` LEFT JOIN `bank`.`user` AS `t3` ON `t1`.`user_id` = `t3`.`id` WHERE ( ( `t1`.`status` = 'WAITING' AND #{memberLevel} >= CASE `t1`.`task_detail_type` WHEN '입금' THEN 1 WHEN '출금' THEN 1 WHEN '카드수령' THEN 1 WHEN '이체' THEN 2 WHEN '체크카드 발급' THEN 2 WHEN '통장 비밀번호 변경' THEN 2 WHEN '입출금 계좌개설' THEN 2 WHEN '적금' THEN 2 WHEN '신용카드 발급' THEN 2 WHEN '대출 상환' THEN 2 WHEN '예금' THEN 3 WHEN '신용대출' THEN 3 WHEN '전세자금대출' THEN 3 WHEN '금융상품가입' THEN 3 WHEN '법인카드 발급' THEN 3 WHEN '소상공인 대출' THEN 4 WHEN '연금신청' THEN 4 WHEN '주택담보대출' THEN 4 WHEN '법인계좌 개설' THEN 4 WHEN '기업대출' THEN 4 WHEN '연체관리' THEN 4 WHEN '부도관리' THEN 5 ELSE 1 END ) OR (`t1`.`status` != 'WAITING' AND `t1`.`member_id` = #{memberId}) ) ORDER BY `t1`.`created_at`

SELECT `t1`.`task_id` AS `taskId`, `t1`.`user_id` AS `userId`, `t1`.`ticket_number` AS `ticketNumber`, `t1`.`task_type` AS `taskType`, `t1`.`task_detail_type` AS `taskDetailType`, `t1`.`assigned_level` AS `assignedLevel`, `t1`.`expected_waiting_time` AS `expectedWaitingTime`, `t1`.`status` AS `status`, `t1`.`member_id` AS `memberId`, `t1`.`ranking` AS `ranking`, `t1`.`created_at` AS `createdAt`, `t1`.`updated_at` AS `updatedAt`, `t2`.`name` AS `name`, `t2`.`level` AS `level`, `t3`.`name` AS `userName`, `t3`.`grade` AS `grade`, `t3`.`gender` AS `gender`, `t3`.`age` AS `age`, `t1`.`is_ai` AS `isAi` FROM `bank`.`task` AS `t1` LEFT JOIN `bank`.`member` AS `t2` ON `t1`.`member_id` = `t2`.`id` LEFT JOIN `bank`.`user` AS `t3` ON `t1`.`user_id` = `t3`.`id` WHERE `t1`.`member_id` = #{memberId} ORDER BY `createdAt`
SELECT task_id AS taskId, assigned_level AS assignedLevel FROM `bank`.`task` WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND status = 'WAITING'

SELECT m.id FROM `bank`.`member` m LEFT JOIN ( SELECT member_id, COUNT(*) AS waiting_cnt FROM `bank`.`task` WHERE status = 'WAITING' GROUP BY member_id ) w ON m.id = w.member_id WHERE m.level >= #{minLevel} AND m.status = 1 AND m.id != #{excludeId} ORDER BY COALESCE(w.waiting_cnt, 0) ASC, m.level ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM `bank`.`member` WHERE status = 1 AND id != #{excludeId} ORDER BY level DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT task_id AS taskId, user_id AS userId, ticket_number AS ticketNumber, task_type AS taskType, task_detail_type AS taskDetailType, assigned_level AS assignedLevel, expected_waiting_time AS expectedWaitingTime, status AS status, member_id AS memberId, ranking AS ranking, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM `bank`.`task` WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'WAITING'
mapper.update:
UPDATE `bank`.`task` SET member_id = #{memberId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE task_id IN
#{id}
UPDATE `bank`.`task` SET member_id = #{targetMemberId}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `bank`.`member` WHERE level >= #{minLevel} AND status = 1

SELECT `t1`.`task_id` AS `taskId`, `t1`.`user_id` AS `userId`, `t1`.`ticket_number` AS `ticketNumber`, `t1`.`task_type` AS `taskType`, `t1`.`task_detail_type` AS `taskDetailType`, `t1`.`assigned_level` AS `assignedLevel`, `t1`.`expected_waiting_time` AS `expectedWaitingTime`, `t1`.`status` AS `status`, `t1`.`member_id` AS `memberId`, `t1`.`ranking` AS `ranking`, `t1`.`created_at` AS `createdAt`, `t1`.`updated_at` AS `updatedAt`, `t2`.`name` AS `name`, `t2`.`level` AS `level` FROM `bank`.`task` AS `t1` LEFT JOIN `bank`.`member` AS `t2` ON `t1`.`member_id` = `t2`.`id` WHERE `t1`.`task_id` = #{taskId} ORDER BY `createdAt` DESC
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT member_id) FROM `bank`.`task` WHERE status = 'IN_PROGRESS'

SELECT t.assigned_level AS taskLevel, COUNT(t.task_id) AS taskCount FROM `bank`.`task` t WHERE DATE(t.created_at) = CURDATE() AND t.status IN ('COMPLETED') GROUP BY t.assigned_level ORDER BY t.assigned_level ASC

SELECT m.id AS memberId, m.name AS memberName, m.level AS memberLevel,
-- 1. 업무 상태 로직 (IN_PROGRESS인 태스크가 있으면 '업무중', 없으면 '대기중') IF(t.task_id IS NULL, '대기중', '업무중') AS currentTaskStatus,
-- 2. 업무 수락 시점 고정 (IN_PROGRESS 상태일 때의 updated_at을 사용) -- 업무 종료(status 변경) 시 t.task_id가 NULL이 되어 시간도 자연스럽게 사라짐 t.updated_at AS taskStartedAt, t.expected_waiting_time AS `expectedWaitingTime`, -- 3. 나머지 필요한 데이터들 m.level AS memberRank, -- 필요시 CASE 문으로 '사원', '대리' 변환 가능 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `bank`.`task` WHERE member_id = m.id AND status = 'COMPLETED' AND DATE(updated_at) = CURDATE()) AS todayCompletedCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `bank`.`task` WHERE status = 'WAITING') AS waitingCount, t.ticket_number AS currentTicket, t.user_id AS userId, t.task_type AS taskType FROM `bank`.`member` m -- 핵심: 현재 해당 직원이 '진행 중'인 업무만 조인 LEFT JOIN `bank`.`task` t ON m.id = t.member_id AND t.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' WHERE m.status = 1 -- 출근한 직원만 조회 ORDER BY m.level DESC, m.name ASC

SELECT -- 오늘 생성되었고 현재 대기 중인 업무 COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'WAITING' AND created_at >= CURDATE() THEN 1 END) AS totalWaiting, -- 오늘 완료 처리된 업무 COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' AND updated_at >= CURDATE() THEN 1 END) AS totalCompleted FROM `bank`.`task` WHERE (status = 'WAITING' AND created_at >= CURDATE()) OR (status = 'COMPLETED' AND updated_at >= CURDATE())

SELECT t.task_id AS taskId, t.ticket_number AS ticketNumber, u.name AS userName, t.task_type AS taskType, t.task_detail_type AS taskDetailType, m.id AS memberId, m.name AS memberName, m.counter_number AS counterNumber, -- member 테이블에 창구번호 컬럼이 있다고 가정 t.status AS status FROM `bank`.`task` t LEFT JOIN `bank`.`user` u ON t.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN `bank`.`member` m ON t.member_id = m.id WHERE t.status IN ('WAITING') ORDER BY t.created_at ASC

SELECT `t1`.`log_id` AS `logId`, `t1`.`task_id` AS `taskId`, `t1`.`member_id` AS `memberId`, `t1`.`action_type` AS `actionType`, `t1`.`processing_note` AS `processingNote`, `t1`.`created_at` AS `createdAt`, `t3`.`id` AS `userId` FROM `bank`.`task_processing_log` AS `t1` LEFT JOIN `bank`.`task` AS `t2` on t1.task_id = t2.task_id LEFT JOIN `bank`.`user` AS `t3` on t2.user_id = t3.id WHERE t3.id = #{userId} ORDER BY t1.created_at DESC
